data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as control_name , count((select distinct sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock>0 ))as c_mem , sum((select sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock>0 ))as sum_share , count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_01_ก_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_01_ก_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ข' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_02_ข_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ข' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_02_ข_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ฉก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_03_ฉก_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ฉก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_03_ฉก_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ท' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_04_ท_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ท' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_04_ท_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ป' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_05_ป_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ป' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_05_ป_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ผ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_06_ผ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ผ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_06_ผ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'พ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_07_พ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'พ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_07_พ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ร' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_08_ร_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ร' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_08_ร_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ว' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_09_ว_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ว' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_09_ว_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ส' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_10_ส_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ส' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_10_ส_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_11_สก_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สก' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_11_สก_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สข' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_12_สข_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สข' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_12_สข_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สค' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_13_สค_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สค' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_13_สค_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สง' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_14_สง_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สง' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_14_สง_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สจ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_15_สจ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สจ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_15_สจ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สช' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_16_สช_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สช' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_16_สช_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สฐ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_17_สฐ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สฐ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_17_สฐ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สน' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_18_สน_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สน' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_18_สน_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สบ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_19_สบ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สบ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_19_สบ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สป' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_20_สป_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สป' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_20_สป_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สพ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_21_สพ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สพ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_21_สพ_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สร' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_22_สร_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สร' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_22_สร_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สส' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_23_สส_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สส' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_23_สส_balance
, count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สห' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_24_สห_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สห' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_24_สห_balance , count(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สอ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no end) as loan_24_สอ_contract , sum(case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สอ' then sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance end) as loan_24_สอ_balance , count(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no)as c_contract_no , sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance)as sum_balance from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where (sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) and ((sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0)) group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)
